name: Nathan Sam
summary: A Cybersecurity professional with 2 years of experience in health IT pursuing an MSc in Artificial Intelligence, with applied experience building and deploying intelligent automation systems. Proficient in Python, machine learning, and data-driven model development, with hands-on experience training models on real-world datasets.

experience.title: Helpdesk / Tech Support
bullets: Delivered Tier 1/2 technical support to 200+ end users across multiple AFC Urgent Care clinics statewide, diagnosing and resolving hardware, software, and network issues with a 90%+ first-call resolution rate using ServiceNow
Reduced average ticket response time through systematic issue tracking, proactive documentation, and structured follow-up within a fast-paced healthcare IT environment
Strengthened endpoint security posture by administering system patches and updates, and supporting deployment of VPN, Wi-Fi infrastructure, and endpoint protection solutions across clinic locations

projects.name: Resume Auto-Apply System
projects.description: Built a Python-based job automation pipeline that scrapes cybersecurity listings, scores them with a custom algorithm, uses Claude Opus 4.8 to tailor resumes and cover letters, and submits via Playwright browser automation and a Chrome extension
